# Exploratory analysis for codelist development

Setup
```{r}
library(opencodecounts)
library(here)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

Load codelist
```{r}
#Import codelist from OpenCodelists.org
adhd_snomed_codelist <- get_codelist("https://www.opencodelists.org/codelist/user/kayleepn/snomed-adhd-test/2586ce25/")
as_tibble(adhd_snomed_codelist)
```

Filter code usage data

```{r}
#Filter SNOMED-CT code usage to include codes from SNOMED-CT codelist
df_adhd_snomed_usage <- snomed_usage |>
    filter(snomed_code %in% adhd_snomed_codelist$code)
``` 

Show code usage table for all codes with usage data
```{r}
all_adhd_snomed_codes <- df_adhd_snomed_usage |>
    group_by(snomed_code, description) |>
    summarise(total_usage = sum(usage)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    slice_max(total_usage, n=29, na_rm=F)
print(all_adhd_snomed_codes)
```
